name: kanbantic-claude-plugin
description: Kanbantic issue lifecycle skills: intake (report / request / propose), triage, prepare, execute, review — all artifacts via Kanbantic MCP. v2.3.0 introduces the InDeployment status (KBT-F236): kanbantic-issue-review now transitions Review → InDeployment on merge instead of directly to Done. The InDeployment → Done transition is operational (deploy webhooks + manual update_issue_status) until KBT-INI032 Epic D ships GateEvaluationService for auto-promotion. v2.2.0 introduced Prepared (KBT-F235). See RELEASE_NOTES_v2.3.0.md.
